notes: The video starts with children already present in the classroom. The last child is seen on the mat with the teacher until the end of the video segment provided.
first_child_evidence: A child in a white shirt is seen walking from the left side of the room towards the center, where a teacher is sitting on a mat with two other children.
last_child_evidence: The last child, wearing a white shirt, is seen lying on the mat with the teacher and other children. The child then sits up and interacts with the teacher.
